Pei Xuan (Yanhuang) иЈҙзҺ„ (еҪҘй»ғ)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pei Xuan (иЈҙзҺ„), styledYanhuang (еҪҘй»ғ). Evaluated by Bu Zhi. A leader scholar, he worked on texts along with Yang Jun. Pei Xuan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
